title: Make use of which-key.nvim
description: Make nested prefix shortcuts, and make it so it showcase the options after typing the first letter

title: Add a tmux command to create a new session with a chosen name
description: Add a tmux-first workflow for creating a new named session. This may be a dedicated command or integrated into the Prefix+s palette, but it should allow picking or typing the session name directly and feel natural inside the existing sesh/tmux workflow.

title: Refactor tmux-session-picker internals without changing behavior
Migrate secrets management from git-crypt to SOPS
description:
Replace git-crypt with SOPS + age for secrets management. Consider cloud KMS (AWS/GCP/Azure) for key sync across machines, or simpler
   approach like storing age key in password manager. Don't over-commit to implementation — evaluate tradeoffs first.

title: Make Prefix+s optimal in tmux with sesh, fzf, and pane previews
description: Refine the Prefix+s tmux launcher into the best combined flow from the current setup, Jorgen-style tmux ergonomics, and sesh. Focus on a fast session picker with fzf, useful tmux-aware previews (including pane/session context where practical), and a polished default flow for switching or creating sessions.

title: Patch opensessions tmux bindings for coexistence
